examples: This southwest region of France is the home of claret.
In Every Man His Own Butler, Cyrus Redding wrote "claret for a bishop, port for a rector, currant for a curate and gin for the clerk".
The craft of claret-making had developed.
Instead of the walls whispering of emerald green, claret and sky blue, they now shout luxury.
The other varieties tasted were shiraz, rioja, claret, pinot grigio and sauvignon blanc.
